name: SARS-CoV-2_XBB_recombination_breakpoint
description: Recombination breakpoint atlas for the XBB family of SARS-CoV-2. Major breakpoint in spike around nt 22897-22942 (S:Y451-V486 region). Parental lineages BJ.1 (5' donor) and BM.1.1.1 (3' donor). Subsequent recombinants (XBC, XAY, XBL, XEC) carry analogous mid-S junctions.
